# Revo ESAI

> AI-powered study assistant for Arabic-speaking students: lesson summaries, mind maps, voice transcription, and a smart Q&A teacher.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Revo ESAI study tools and AI assistant.
- [Login](/login): Sign in with Google to access AI usage and activation codes.
- [Revo Teacher](/teacher): Conversational AI teacher to ask questions and get explanations.
